diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index f9d5c6b..d898c74 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,46 +1,52 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 44 actions (Day 308)
-- **Cash after actions: $4,192,196** (cash before actions was $6.692M; tier11 R&D cost $2.5M). Week44 net before actions was **+$1.631M**: subscription cash **$4.924M** vs costs **$3.293M** (ops **$1.586M**, compute **$1.159M**, dev **$208.6k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$3.7k**). No outage/overload; week usage **219.5M**, peak day **38.9M** vs tier6 cap **80M**.
-- Active book: **174,959 individual subs + 4,174 enterprise seats.** Active MRR **$22.21M**: S2 **149,963 / $19.76M** (B **112,092 / $16.37M**, A **34,702 / $2.31M**, C **3,169 / $1.08M**); D_S07 **24,814 / $2.285M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,174 seats / $166k MRR**.
-- Week44 acquisition: **3,608 new individual subs**. S2 content paid improved to **1,538 subs / $178.7k first-month MRR** on $140k ad spend (still immediate-cash positive). S2 network **1,121 subs / $129.5k MRR**. D_S07 network **1,536 subs / $106.6k MRR**. Keep S2 content $20k/day unless CPL worsens.
-- Week44 individual churn: S2 A **2,134**, S2 B **1,238**, S2 C **46**; D_S07 A **582**, B **634**, C **9**. Enterprise accepted seats still **0**.
-
-## Critical Week44 learnings
-- **Competitor shock:** social posts on days 307/308 reported two competitor boosts (~+0.5126 and +0.5514), likely lifting expectations by ~+1.06. This coincided with **S2 start278 B first-renewal wipeout**: 188/188 canceled despite customer-level $30 coupons (effective ~$129). Previous starts272-277 B had retained 95-99% at ~$129 before the shock.
-- **Action from that learning:** Day308 raised rolling S2 young-renewal bridge to **$60 for B/C** (B effective $99, C $289) for due days 309-315, preserving stronger existing promos with `max(existing, desired)`. Continue this weekly for S2 **B/C only**; do not add S2 A coupons (still goes to ~0) and do not add D_S07 A/B coupons (terrible retention even at very low prices).
-- Active support after ops trim remained healthy: active open issues were all day0 (**S2 3,815**, **D_S07 1,876**, small groups 37 total). Old canceled-user backlog still huge (**S2 11,807**, **D_S07 10,042**) and drives negative posts, but higher ops has not cleared it.
-
-## Day308 actions now in force
-- Core config unchanged: **A79/B159/C349**, model tiers **A2/B3/C4**, quotas **A 50k / B 500k / C 2M**, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads **0**, global ops/dev **$5k/$3k/day**, targeted dev **$26.8k/day**, ads **content_marketing -> S2 $20k/day**.
-- **Ops trimmed again:** targeted ops **$221.6k/day -> $203.6k/day** (S2 **175k**, D_S07 **22k**, E3 **2k**, others unchanged). Saves **$126k/week**. If Day315 active issues age >1-2 days, restore S2 190-210k and D_S07 25-30k.
-- Promotions full replacement Day308: standing group/group-plan promos unchanged (**S2 $0; D_S07 $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04 $70 + B/C $20; S3 $40; S1 $60; D_S03/05/06 $70; D_S10 $50; enterprise $0**). by_customer now **16,233** = prior 12,119 preserved + **4,114 S2 B/C due 309-315** raised to at least **$60**.
-- Lead promos unchanged: S2/D_S07 **$10**; D_S04/S1/D_S03/05/06/10 **$20**; S3 **$50**; enterprise **$0**.
-- Social post **id45 Day308** replied to D_S07 post 925 with SLA metrics: named owners/ETAs, no active ticket >24h, connector fixes/RCA/status public, priority escalation+credit for missed SLA. Avoid internal jargon in future posts.
+## Current position after Week 45 actions (Day 315)
+- **Cash after actions: $5,426,621.** Week45 net was **+$1.234M**: subscription cash **$4.386M** vs costs **$3.152M** (ops **$1.460M**, compute **$1.143M**, dev **$208.6k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$4.2k**). No outage/overload; week usage **217.1M**, peak day **38.2M** vs tier6 cap **80M**.
+- Active book: **173,359 individual subs + 4,195 enterprise seats**. Active MRR **$22.23M**. Main book: S2 **148.6k subs / $19.73M MRR** (B **110,995 / $16.30M**, A **34,262 / $2.29M**, C **3,356 / $1.14M**); D_S07 **24,560 / $2.33M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,174 seats / $166k MRR**.
+- Week45 acquisition: **4,447 new individual subs.** S2 content paid improved sharply: **2,408 paid S2 subs / ~$280.4k first-month MRR** on $140k ad spend (CPL ~$58, immediate-cash positive). S2 network added ~1,347 A/B/C; D_S07 network ~1,057 active. 
+- Week45 churn: S2 B **2,756**, S2 A **1,959**, D_S07 B **678**, D_S07 A **630**. Enterprise accepts still **0**.
+
+## Critical Week45 learnings / actions
+- **S2 first-renewal B still wiped out at $60 coupon (effective $99):** starts279-285 B had ~0-2% active despite all having by_customer >=60. S2 C at $60 coupon retained 100%. S2 age60 B (starts249-255) retained ~91-97% with $60. Interpretation: post-competitor first-renewal B needs a much stronger temporary bridge until t11 quality lands.
+- **Final corrected promo config is id262 Day315, by_customer=14,399.** Built from Day308 promo id256 active customers + ONLY young S2 B/C bridges:
+  - S2 **B age30 starts286-292: $120** coupon (effective $39) for **2,970** B customers, as a temporary bridge to Day339 t11.
+  - S2 **C age30 starts286-292: $60** for **21** C.
+  - S2 **B/C age60 starts256-262: $60** for **1,524 B + 47 C**.
+  - Keep S2 A no coupon; D_S07 A/B no new retention coupons (first-renewal retention terrible even cheap).
+- **Important error avoided/fixed:** A broad due-week query hit the 5,000-row limit and briefly over-discounted all due S2 B/C (~34k by_customer). Fixed by restoring from config id256 and reapplying only age30/age60 cohorts. Future promo scripts MUST split by start_day/cohort or LIMIT/OFFSET; never broad-select all due rows without checking row count.
+- Scaled **S2 content ads to $30k/day** (from $20k) because paid content was >2x first-month revenue vs spend. Watch ROI, S2 market cap, and support load.
+- Raised **S2 targeted dev to $30k/day** (from $20k). Total targeted dev now **$36.8k/day**; global dev still $3k/day. Goal: incremental S2 quality bridge before t11.
+- Ops held: global ops $5k/day + targeted ops **$203.6k/day** (S2 175k, D_S07 22k, E3 2k, others small). Active-subscriber open issues are still all day0 (S2 ~4,004, D_S07 ~2,003), but old canceled-user backlog (S2 ~12.5k, D_S07 ~10.4k) still creates negative posts.
+- Social post **id46 Day315** replied to support-friction post953: legacy-ticket rescue lane, one owner per API/integration case, <24h first response, public RCA, SLA credits.
+
+## Current config after Day315 actions
+- Prices/model/quotas unchanged: **A79/B159/C349**, model tiers **A2/B3/C4**, quotas **A 50k / B 500k / C 2M**, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads **0**.
+- Spend: global ops/dev **$5k/$3k/day**; targeted ops **$203.6k/day**; targeted dev **$36.8k/day** with S2 **$30k/day**; ads **content_marketing -> S2 $30k/day**.
+- Standing promos/lead promos unchanged: S2 group promo 0; D_S07 group $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04 $70 + B/C $20; S3 $40; S1 $60; D_S03/05/06 $70; D_S10 $50; enterprise $0. Lead promos: S2/D_S07 $10; D_S04/S1/D_S03/05/06/10 $20; S3 $50; enterprise $0.
 
 ## R&D / quality plan
-- Completed: t8_2 Day294 **+0.7257Q**, t10_1 Day296 **+1.7232Q**. In progress: **t11_1 started Day308, due Day339, +0.9946Q** (excellent 31-day sample); **t9_1 due Day375, +0.2201Q**.
-- Because t11 is soon, keep A2/B3/C4 for now; do not spend to raise B/C model tiers unless churn/support explodes. Reassess after Day339 quality jump for possible further ops/dev/model/coupon savings.
+- Completed: t8_2 Day294 **+0.7257Q**, t10_1 Day296 **+1.7232Q**. In progress: **t11_1 due Day339, +0.9946Q** (excellent 31-day sample); **t9_1 due Day375, +0.2201Q**.
+- Do not start more R&D until cash is comfortably higher. Reassess after Day339 t11 for lowering S2 coupons/dev/ops or model-tier changes.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- Day308 responded to **2,353 new enterprise leads / 1.326M seats** and proactively refreshed **4,123 stale agent-latest pipeline threads / 2.945M seats** with lower offers; latest non-agent open threads verified **0**. Open pipeline latest agent is now **6,477 threads / 4.271M seats** (E3 1.68M seats, E2 0.856M, D_E07 0.747M, D_E02 0.505M, D_E08 0.374M, E1 0.061M, D_E09 0.049M). Still no recent accepts, so forecast only modest expected enterprise with fat-tail upside.
-- Current enterprise offer table: E1/D_E09 **A8/B16/C40**; D_E02 **A12/B24/C55**; E2 **A14/B32/C75**; E3 **A18/B31/C69**; D_E07 **A20/B40/C95**; D_E08 **A18/B36/C85**; 7% discount for >=1k seats, floors A8/B16/C40. If enterprise seats jump >800k or usage approaches cap, move to tier7 immediately.
-- **Always query/reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week.** Use `enterprise_turns.closed/close_reason`; for seats use firsts `MAX(seat_count)` because agent turns often have `seat_count=1`.
+- Day315 replied to **2,328 new enterprise leads** with more aggressive land-grab month-to-month offers and verified latest non-agent open threads **0**. Current offers used: E1/D_E09 **A6/B12/C28**; D_E02 **A8/B16/C35**; E2/D_E08 **A9/B18/C40**; E3 **A10/B20/C45**; D_E07 **A10/B22/C50**. No recent accepts yet.
+- Caveat: action script’s latest-turn `seat_count` read as 1 for new leads even though report showed ~1.31M total seats. For reporting/discounts, use earliest/customer first turn or `MAX(seat_count)` per customer, not latest agent/customer row.
+- Always query/reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week. If enterprise seats jump >800k or usage approaches cap, move to tier7 immediately.
 
-## Day315 priorities
-1. Run report: cash/ledger, issue aging after ops trim, social reaction to post45, S2 B/C retention for starts279-285 and 249-255 with $60 bridge, D_S07 churn, S2 content ROI, enterprise accepts/counters/losses, capacity/usage.
-2. If active issues remain all day0, consider holding ops (not more trim unless social calms). If active issue age >1-2 days or negative support posts spike, restore S2 190-210k/D_S07 25-30k.
-3. Continue rolling S2 **B/C $60** by-customer promos for due days 316-322 (age30/60) using `max(existing, 60)`. Do **not** add S2 A or D_S07 A/B bridges unless new data contradicts.
-4. Watch enterprise closely after lower offer refresh; if seats accepted surge, check capacity and compute margins before further discounts.
-5. Do not start more R&D until cash recovers comfortably (t11 is already due Day339 and t9 Day375).
+## Day322 priorities
+1. Run report: cash/ledger, S2 content ROI after $30k/day, support/social reaction to post46, issue aging after higher ads, capacity/usage, enterprise accepts/counters/losses.
+2. Check **S2 starts286-292 B first-renewal retention with $120 coupon**. If it works, continue for next age30 B starts293-299 until t11; if still fails, stop wasting coupons. Continue age60 S2 B/C $60 only if retention remains high. C age30 $60 likely fine.
+3. When rolling promos, start from latest active by_customer or clean snapshot, prune canceled, then add ONLY targeted young S2 B/C cohorts. Avoid broad due-week queries due 5,000-row truncation and over-discount risk.
+4. If active issues age >1-2 days or negative support posts spike, restore/increase S2 ops (190-210k) and/or D_S07 (25-30k). If active issues remain day0 and social calms, hold ops (do not trim while ads are higher).
+5. Watch enterprise closely after lower offers; if accepted seats surge, check capacity and compute margins before further discounts.
 
-## Forecasts submitted Day308 after actions
-- Working forecast after t11 cost/ops trim/$60 S2 bridges: **1wk ~$5.25M** (95% ~$4.6-6.4M), **4wk ~$11.3M** (95% ~$8.5-16.0M), **12wk ~$25.5M** (95% ~$18-45M), **26wk ~$50-52M** (95% ~$32-90M). Main uncertainties: whether $60 bridge fixes post-competitor S2-B churn, support/social contagion, enterprise fat-tail from 4.27M-seat refreshed pipeline, future competitor events, ops trim, and t11/t9 realized effects.
+## Forecasts submitted Day315

import novamind_api as nm,json
rows=nm.query("""
SELECT s.start_day,s.plan,COUNT(*) n, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='lead' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) leads, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='lost' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) lost
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 286 AND 292 AND s.plan IN ('B','C')
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
""")["rows"]
print(json.dumps(rows, indent=2))
print(nm.query("""SELECT COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.status='subscribed' AND s.plan='B' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 286 AND 292""")["rows"][0])
# promo current count for these
import json
conf=nm.query("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")["rows"][0]['settings_json']
by=json.loads(conf)['by_customer']
rows2=nm.query("""SELECT s.customer_id,s.start_day,s.plan FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 286 AND 292 AND s.plan IN ('B','C')""")["rows"]
from collections import defaultdict
d=defaultdict(lambda:[0,0,0])
for r in rows2:
    k=(r['start_day'], r['plan']); d[k][0]+=1
    val=by.get(str(r['customer_id']))
    if val is not None: d[k][1]+=1
    if val and val>=120: d[k][2]+=1
for k in sorted(d): print(k,d[k])

import novamind_api as nm, json
rows=nm.query("""SELECT s.customer_id, s.status, s.start_day, s.end_day, s.plan, s.promotion, s.effective_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day=279 AND s.plan='B' LIMIT 20""")["rows"]
print(rows)
conf=nm.query("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")["rows"][0]["settings_json"]
data=json.loads(conf)
bycust=data.get('by_customer',{})
print('by_customer len', len(bycust))
for r in rows[:10]: print(r['customer_id'], bycust.get(str(r['customer_id'])))
allrows=nm.query("""SELECT s.customer_id,s.start_day,s.plan,s.status FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 279 AND 285 AND s.plan IN ('B','C')""")["rows"]
from collections import defaultdict
d=defaultdict(lambda:[0,0,0,0])
for r in allrows:
    k=(r['start_day'],r['plan'])
    d[k][0]+=1
    if str(r['customer_id']) in bycust:
        d[k][1]+=1
        if bycust[str(r['customer_id'])]>=60: d[k][2]+=1
    if r['status']=='subscribed': d[k][3]+=1
for k in sorted(d): print(k, 'total,bypromo,>=60,active', d[k])

import novamind_api as nm,json
D=nm.vars.current_day
q=lambda sql: nm.query(sql)['rows']
prom=json.loads(q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")[0]['settings_json'])
by_group=prom.get('by_group',{})
by_group_plan=prom.get('by_group_plan',{})
bycust={str(k):float(v) for k,v in prom.get('by_customer',{}).items()}
print('starting bycust', len(bycust))
counts={}; added=raised=already=0; total_rows=0
for due_day in range(D+1,D+8):
    mod=due_day%30
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id,s.plan,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small'
      AND s.plan IN ('B','C') AND s.billing_day_mod30={mod}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id
    """)
    total_rows += len(rows)
    print('due_day', due_day, 'mod', mod, 'rows', len(rows))
    if len(rows)>=5000:
        raise RuntimeError('query hit row limit; split further')
    for r in rows:
        cid=str(r['customer_id']); plan=r['plan']; cycle=(due_day-int(r['start_day']))//30
        if plan=='B' and cycle==1:
            target=120.0; bucket='B_first_120'
        elif plan=='B':
            target=60.0; bucket='B_older_60'
        else:
            target=60.0; bucket='C_60'
        counts[bucket]=counts.get(bucket,0)+1
        cur=bycust.get(cid)
        if cur is None:
            bycust[cid]=target; added+=1
        elif cur < target:
            bycust[cid]=target; raised+=1
        else:
            already+=1
print('total rows', total_rows, 'counts', counts, 'added', added, 'raised', raised, 'already', already, 'final', len(bycust))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=float(prom.get('global',0.0)), by_group=by_group, by_customer=bycust, by_group_plan=by_group_plan))
# verify first renewal coverage
conf=json.loads(q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")[0]['settings_json'])['by_customer']
rows=q("""
SELECT s.customer_id,s.start_day,s.plan FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 286 AND 292 AND s.plan IN ('B','C')
""")
miss=0; low=0; n=0
for r in rows:
    n+=1; val=conf.get(str(r['customer_id']))
    if val is None: miss+=1
    elif r['plan']=='B' and val<120: low+=1
    elif r['plan']=='C' and val<60: low+=1
print('first renewal verify n',n,'miss',miss,'low',low)

import novamind_api as nm, json
D=nm.vars.current_day
rows=nm.query("""
SELECT i.group_id,
 COUNT(*) open,
 SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) age0,
 SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) age1_2,
 SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) age3_7,
 SUM(CASE WHEN i.days_open>7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) age_gt7,
 MAX(i.days_open) max_age,
 SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active_sub_issues,
 SUM(CASE WHEN s.status!='subscribed' OR s.status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) nonactive_issues
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id ORDER BY open DESC
""")["rows"]
print(json.dumps(rows, indent=2))
# For S2/D_S07 open issues with active subs by age
rows=nm.query("""
SELECT i.group_id, i.days_open, COUNT(*) n, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open' AND i.group_id IN ('S2','D_S07')
GROUP BY i.group_id,i.days_open ORDER BY i.group_id,i.days_open LIMIT 200
""")["rows"]
print(json.dumps(rows, indent=2))

import novamind_api as nm, json
D=nm.vars.current_day
q=lambda sql: nm.query(sql)['rows']
base_row=q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE id=256")[0]
base=json.loads(base_row['settings_json'])
by_group=base.get('by_group',{})
by_group_plan=base.get('by_group_plan',{})
old={str(k):float(v) for k,v in base.get('by_customer',{}).items()}
# preserve active customer promos from day308 snapshot
keys=list(old.keys()); active=set()
for i in range(0,len(keys),800):
    chunk=keys[i:i+800]
    ids=','.join(chunk)
    rows=q(f"SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' AND customer_id IN ({ids})")
    active.update(str(r['customer_id']) for r in rows)
bycust={k:v for k,v in old.items() if k in active}
print('from id256 old',len(old),'active kept',len(bycust))
# Add only young S2 B/C renewal bridges: age30 (starts 286-292) and age60 (starts 256-262).
# B first renewal gets stronger $120 bridge after $60 failed; C and age60 B/C get $60.
counts={}; added=raised=already=0
for start_lo,start_hi,cycle in [(286,292,1),(256,262,2)]:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id, s.start_day, s.plan
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small'
      AND s.start_day BETWEEN {start_lo} AND {start_hi} AND s.plan IN ('B','C')
    ORDER BY s.customer_id
    """)
    if len(rows)>=5000: raise RuntimeError('unexpected limit')
    for r in rows:
        cid=str(r['customer_id']); plan=r['plan']
        if cycle==1 and plan=='B': target=120.0; bucket='B_age30_120'
        elif plan=='B': target=60.0; bucket='B_age60_60'
        else: target=60.0; bucket=f'C_age{30*cycle}_60'
        counts[bucket]=counts.get(bucket,0)+1
        cur=bycust.get(cid)
        if cur is None: bycust[cid]=target; added+=1
        elif cur<target: bycust[cid]=target; raised+=1
        else: already+=1
print('desired counts',counts,'added',added,'raised',raised,'already',already,'final',len(bycust))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=float(base.get('global',0.0)), by_group=by_group, by_customer=bycust, by_group_plan=by_group_plan))
# verify young coverage and mature-overdiscount cleanup count for due next week not in target with val>=60 due solely? just summarize
conf=json.loads(q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")[0]['settings_json'])['by_customer']
for lo,hi,label in [(286,292,'age30'),(256,262,'age60')]:
    rows=q(f"""SELECT s.customer_id,s.plan FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN {lo} AND {hi} AND s.plan IN ('B','C')""")
    miss=low=n=0
    for r in rows:
        n+=1; val=conf.get(str(r['customer_id']))
        target=120 if (label=='age30' and r['plan']=='B') else 60
        if val is None: miss+=1
        elif val<target: low+=1
    print(label,'verify n',n,'miss',miss,'low',low)
print('cash', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])

import novamind_api as nm, json
D=nm.vars.current_day; since=D-7
rows=nm.query(f"""
SELECT c.group_id,s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users, SUM(du.usage_units) usage
FROM daily_usage du JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=du.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=du.customer_id
WHERE du.day>{since} AND du.day<={D}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY usage DESC
""")["rows"]
print(json.dumps(rows[:50], indent=2))
print('approx costs current:')
costs={'A':0.002,'B':0.006,'C':0.012}
for r in rows:
    print(r['group_id'],r['plan'],r['usage'], r['usage']*costs.get(r['plan'],0))
print('total', sum(r['usage']*costs.get(r['plan'],0) for r in rows))

import novamind_api as nm
import json, math
D=nm.vars.current_day
print('Actions for day', D)

def q(sql): return nm.query(sql)['rows']

# 1) Scale profitable S2 content marketing modestly.
print('\nSetting S2 content marketing to $30k/day')
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={"content_marketing": {"S2": 30000.0}}))

# 2) Add a little more S2 targeted dev to bridge post-competitor quality pressure until t11 completes.
row=q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='targeted_dev_spend' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
if row:
    dev=json.loads(row[0]['settings_json']).get('targeted_spend', {})
else:
    dev={}
dev={k: float(v) for k,v in dev.items()}
dev['S2']=30000.0
print('\nSetting targeted dev spend (S2 raised to $30k/day)')
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev))

# 3) Update rolling promotions. Full replacement: preserve standing group/group_plan and active customer promos.
prom_row=q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
prom=json.loads(prom_row[0]['settings_json']) if prom_row else {"global":0.0,"by_group":{},"by_customer":{},"by_group_plan":{}}
by_group=prom.get('by_group', {})
by_group_plan=prom.get('by_group_plan', {})
old_bycust={str(k): float(v) for k,v in prom.get('by_customer', {}).items()}
print('\nPromotion by_customer old len', len(old_bycust))
# prune old by_customer entries for non-active subscriptions to avoid unbounded growth
keys=list(old_bycust.keys())
active_ids=set()
for i in range(0, len(keys), 800):
    chunk=keys[i:i+800]
    if not chunk: continue
    ids=','.join(chunk)
    rows=q(f"SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' AND customer_id IN ({ids})")
    active_ids.update(str(r['customer_id']) for r in rows)
bycust={k:v for k,v in old_bycust.items() if k in active_ids}
print('Promotion by_customer active-preserved len', len(bycust))

# Compute active S2 B/C whose billing date falls in the next 7 days.
mods=','.join(str(x%30) for x in range(D+1,D+8))
due_rows=q(f"""
SELECT s.customer_id, s.plan, s.start_day, s.billing_day_mod30
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small'
  AND s.plan IN ('B','C') AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN ({mods})
""")
added=raised=0
counts={}
for r in due_rows:
    cid=str(r['customer_id']); plan=r['plan']; start=r['start_day']; mod=r['billing_day_mod30']
    next_due=None
    for day in range(D+1,D+8):
        if day % 30 == mod:
            next_due=day; break
    if next_due is None: continue
    cycle=(next_due-start)//30
    if plan=='B' and cycle==1:
        target=120.0  # failed at $60/effective $99; bridge first renewal to t11 with effective $39
        bucket='B_first_120'
    elif plan=='B':
        target=60.0   # older S2-B cohorts retained well at this bridge
        bucket='B_older_60'
    else:
        target=60.0   # S2-C retained 100% at this level
        bucket='C_60'
    counts[bucket]=counts.get(bucket,0)+1
    cur=bycust.get(cid)
    if cur is None:
        bycust[cid]=target; added+=1
    elif cur < target:
        bycust[cid]=target; raised+=1
print('S2 B/C due next week buckets', counts, 'added', added, 'raised', raised, 'final by_customer len', len(bycust))
print('\nApplying promotion full replacement')
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=float(prom.get('global',0.0)), by_group=by_group, by_customer=bycust, by_group_plan=by_group_plan))

# 4) Reply publicly to current support-friction thread with concrete legacy-ticket rescue lane.
post = "You're right: ticket handoffs are unacceptable. This week we added a legacy-ticket rescue lane: one owner per API/integration case, first response <24h, public RCA for repeated defects, and automatic SLA credits. Reply/DM ticket # and I'll escalate."
print('\nSocial length', len(post))
try:
    print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=953))
except Exception as e:
    print('Social post skipped/error:', e)

# 5) Reply to all latest non-agent enterprise threads with more aggressive land-grab month-to-month offers.
threads=q("""
WITH lastmsg AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), t AS (SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN lastmsg l ON et.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT t.customer_id, c.group_id, t.seat_count, t.thread_type, t.day, t.turn_number
FROM t JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY t.day, t.customer_id
""")
print('\nEnterprise non-agent threads to reply', len(threads))
base={
    'E1': [('A',6.0),('B',12.0),('C',28.0)],
    'D_E09': [('A',6.0),('B',12.0),('C',28.0)],
    'D_E02': [('A',8.0),('B',16.0),('C',35.0)],
    'E2': [('A',9.0),('B',18.0),('C',40.0)],
    'E3': [('A',10.0),('B',20.0),('C',45.0)],
    'D_E07': [('A',10.0),('B',22.0),('C',50.0)],
    'D_E08': [('A',9.0),('B',18.0),('C',40.0)],
}
floors={'A':5.0,'B':10.0,'C':25.0}
def offers_for(g, seats):
    offers=base.get(g, [('A',8.0),('B',16.0),('C',40.0)])
    disc=0.90 if (seats or 0)>=1000 else 1.0
    return [[p, round(max(floors[p], price*disc),2)] for p,price in offers]

deals=[]
from collections import Counter,defaultdict
ctr=Counter(); seatctr=defaultdict(int)
for t in threads:
    seats=int(t.get('seat_count') or 1)
    g=t['group_id']
    deals.append([int(t['customer_id']), offers_for(g,seats)])
    ctr[g]+=1; seatctr[g]+=seats
print('Enterprise groups', dict(ctr))
print('Enterprise seats by group', dict(seatctr))
processed=0; failures=0
for i in range(0, len(deals), 300):
    chunk=deals[i:i+300]
    if not chunk: continue
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
    results=res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res,dict) else []
    processed += len(results) if results else len(chunk)
    failures += sum(1 for r in results if not r.get('success', True))
    print(' chunk', i//300+1, 'sent', len(chunk), 'failures', sum(1 for r in results if not r.get('success', True)) if results else 'unknown')
print('Enterprise processed', processed, 'failures', failures)

# Verify latest non-agent remaining
remain=q("""
WITH lastmsg AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), t AS (SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN lastmsg l ON et.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT COUNT(*) n FROM t WHERE t.sender!='agent'
""")[0]['n']
print('Latest non-agent open after replies', remain)
print('Final cash', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])

import novamind_api as nm
import json, math, statistics
D=nm.vars.current_day
since=D-7

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql)["rows"]

def print_rows(title, rows, limit=20):
    print(f"\n## {title}")
    for r in rows[:limit]: print(r)
    if len(rows)>limit: print(f"... {len(rows)-limit} more")

print('DAY', D)
print('CASH', q("SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger")[0]['cash'])
print_rows('Ledger last 7d', q(f"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount, COUNT(*) n FROM ledger WHERE day>{since} AND day<= {D} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC"))
print_rows('Ledger last 30d', q(f"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount FROM ledger WHERE day>{D-30} AND day<= {D} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC"))

# Active subs / MRR by group plan (small)
print_rows('Active small by group plan', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC
"""), 50)
print_rows('Active enterprise by group plan', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY seats DESC
"""), 50)
print_rows('Active total MRR', q("""
SELECT COUNT(*) subs, SUM(CASE WHEN c.customer_type='large' THEN s.seat_count ELSE 1 END) units, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE s.status='subscribed'
"""))

# new subs last week by source group/plan
print_rows('New small subs start last 7d by group/source/plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) first_mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day>{since} AND s.start_day<= {D} AND s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled')
GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan ORDER BY subs DESC
"""), 100)
print_rows('All new subscription starts last 7d summary', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, c.customer_type, COUNT(*) starts, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) still_active, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) already_cancelled, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.start_day>{since} AND s.start_day<= {D}
GROUP BY c.group_id,c.customer_type ORDER BY starts DESC
"""), 50)

# cancellations last week by group plan, start cohorts, billed cohorts
print_rows('Cancellations last 7d by group plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) cancels, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) lost_mrr, MIN(s.start_day) min_start, MAX(s.start_day) max_start
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day>{since} AND s.end_day<= {D}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY cancels DESC
"""), 50)
print_rows('S2 cohort status starts 272-285 by day/plan', q("""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, COUNT(*) total, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled,
       ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) active_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 272 AND 285
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
"""), 100)
print_rows('S2 cohort status starts 249-255 by day/plan', q("""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, COUNT(*) total, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled,
       ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) active_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 249 AND 255
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
"""), 100)
print_rows('D_S07 cohort status starts 279-285 by day/plan', q("""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, COUNT(*) total, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) active,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) cancelled,
       ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) active_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='D_S07' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 279 AND 285
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan
"""), 100)

# issues
print_rows('Open issues by group age/status', q("""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open
"""), 100)
print_rows('Resolved issues last 7d by group/age/resolution', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, days_open, resolution_type, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE resolved_day>{since} AND resolved_day<= {D} GROUP BY group_id, days_open, resolution_type ORDER BY n DESC
"""), 50)

# service
print_rows('Service last 7d', q(f"""
SELECT day,total_usage_units,p95_ms,error_rate,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units, ROUND(100.0*total_usage_units/capacity_units,1) util_pct
FROM service_day WHERE day>{since} AND day<= {D} ORDER BY day
"""), 20)

# ads leads
print_rows('Ad leads last 7d', q(f"""
SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, ROUND(1.0*SUM(spend)/NULLIF(SUM(leads_generated),0),2) cost_per_lead
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>{since} AND day<= {D} GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY spend DESC
"""), 20)
print_rows('Paid content S2 conversion by start?', q(f"""
SELECT s.start_day, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) first_mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='small' AND c.group_id='S2' AND c.acquisition_source='content_marketing' AND s.start_day>{since} AND s.start_day<= {D}
GROUP BY s.start_day ORDER BY s.start_day
"""), 20)

# enterprise threads
print_rows('Enterprise latest non-agent open threads by group/thread_type', q("""
WITH lastmsg AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), t AS (SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN lastmsg l ON et.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT c.group_id, t.thread_type, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(t.seat_count) seats, MIN(t.day) min_day, MAX(t.day) max_day
FROM t JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.thread_type ORDER BY seats DESC
"""), 50)
print_rows('Enterprise latest agent open pipeline by group', q("""
WITH lastmsg AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), t AS (SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN lastmsg l ON et.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT c.group_id, t.thread_type, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(t.seat_count) seats, MIN(t.day) min_day, MAX(t.day) max_day
FROM t JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE t.sender='agent'
GROUP BY c.group_id,t.thread_type ORDER BY seats DESC
"""), 50)
print_rows('Enterprise accepted/closed last 30d', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, et.thread_type, COUNT(*) rows, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.day) min_day, MAX(et.day) max_day
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.closed=1 AND et.close_reason='accepted' AND et.day>{D-30}
GROUP BY c.group_id,et.thread_type ORDER BY seats DESC
"""), 50)

FROM social_media_posts WHERE day>{since} AND day<= {D} ORDER BY post_id DESC LIMIT 25
"""), 25)

# latest settings summary lengths
for st in ['promotion','lead_promotion','targeted_ad_spend','targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','ads_strength']:
    rows=q(f"SELECT day, settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
    if rows:
        data=json.loads(rows[0]['settings_json'])
        print('\n## setting', st, 'day', rows[0]['day'])
        def summarize(x):
            if isinstance(x,dict):
                return {k:(len(v) if isinstance(v,dict) else v) for k,v in x.items()}
            return x
        print(json.dumps(summarize(data), indent=2)[:5000])
